creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Dear Pascal,

I am going to suggest this very simple patch.  Simply replace 
spider/files/patch-ad with the attached file.

I would test it, but I find that I am so unskilled at this game, that I 
am unable to get to 51 moves.  So can you try it out?  If it works, I'll 
go ahead and commit it.

Thanks, Stephen
